identityMaster.role: Golem Attack visual-fix-v2 identity and grounded neutral-pose source; earlier pre-fix artwork is forbidden.

productionMethod.description: Frame 000 preserves the visual-fix-v2 master. Frames 001-007 use restrained Shepard control-point motion on the same master pixels: feet/lower anchors stay fixed while torso, head, shoulders, and attached crystals move by 1-5 pixels. This provides heavy breathing and secondary lag without regenerating details.
productionMethod.alpha: True alpha is retained. Low-alpha resampling fringe is removed with an 8% alpha-level floor; pixels below y=601 are cleared so the source foot baseline cannot drift. Checker forensic validation compares every frame with the clean visual-fix-v2 source topology.
productionMethod.rejectedCandidate: An initial generative edit candidate was rejected before repository inclusion because it changed stone/crystal details and baked a checkerboard. No pixels from that candidate are present in this set.
productionMethod.canonicalClaim: Motion-test source only; not canonical artwork.

frames.controlPointIntent: head -4y; shoulders/chest -3y; attached arms -1y; feet fixed
upper mass +1-2x and -2-3y; fixed feet and controlled center
upper mass +1x and -1y returning toward neutral; feet fixed
shoulders retain -1y lag while head/chest settle; feet fixed
head retains -1y lag; all other control points at neutral; feet fixed
